overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of skiing across a vast alpine glacier surrounded by towering snow-capped peaks. The player moves smoothly through the pristine snowfield under a clear blue sky, with PlayStation controller prompts visible at the bottom of the screen indicating this is from a winter sports video game.

scene_state.functional_zone: open glacier with ski tracks and crevasses

events.description: camera tilts down to show character shadow on the snow surface

agents.ego_description: skiing steadily across the snowfield, occasionally glancing down at the snow tracks and shadow

entered.detail: vast expanse of white snow covering the glacier surface with visible ski tracks
tall snow-covered peaks forming the left boundary of the glacier valley
steep mountain walls covered in snow and ice on the right side
dominant snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance straight ahead
linear depressions and tracks in the snow from previous skiing paths

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view of skiing across a pristine glacier. The camera moves smoothly over the snow-covered terrain, occasionally tilting down to reveal the skier's shadow. Towering mountain ranges frame both sides of the wide-open valley, with a prominent central peak visible in the distance under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive snow basin between mountain ranges

events.description: camera pans upward and left to reveal the full mountain panorama

agents.ego_description: continuing to ski through the open basin, surveying the surrounding peaks while maintaining forward momentum

entered.detail: gentle snow-covered undulations on the left side of the glacier
patches of exposed blue glacial ice visible on the mountain faces

segments.scene_description: The skier moves through the wide snow basin between mountain ranges, with the camera panning to capture the expansive alpine scenery. The central peak grows larger as the distance closes, and distinctive blue ice formations become visible on the mountain faces. The left mountain range shifts closer while the right range falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching mountain wall with glacial ice features

events.description: terrain becomes more enclosed as the skier approaches the massive central mountain face

agents.ego_description: skiing toward the towering mountain face ahead, navigating the final approach to the peak

entered.detail: massive vertical snow and rock face of the central peak filling the forward view
vertical streaks of blue glacial ice running down the mountain face
snow-covered slope of the left mountain range visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the massive central mountain face, which dominates the view as the skier gets closer. The terrain feels more enclosed as the valley narrows. Distinctive blue ice streaks become prominent on the mountain wall, and the snow field shows more detailed texture and ripples as the distance to the peak decreases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent across a pristine glacier that gradually narrows as it approaches a towering central mountain peak. It begins with a smooth glide over a wide-open snowfield under a bright midday sun, with the camera occasionally tilting down to reveal the skier's shadow against the white terrain. As the skier moves deeper into the basin, the expansive alpine scenery shifts, bringing the left mountain range closer while the right falls behind and the distant central peak grows in scale. The scene then transitions into a more enclosed valley where the snow takes on detailed ripples and textures. Finally, the camera closes in on the massive mountain face, which dominates the view and reveals prominent streaks of blue ice embedded in the rock.
